nodes.label: 3-Phase Scheduling Pipeline
nodes.rationale: The scheduling pipeline is split into 3 sequential phases: (1) GraphColoring for pre-assignment, (2) CP-SAT for hard constraint feasibility with 120s timeout, (3) Genetic Algorithm for soft constraint optimization over up to 200 generations. Each phase passes its output to the next, providing warm-start hints.

nodes.label: EntidadBase (Abstract Base Entity)
nodes.rationale: Centralizes Guid identity and equality-by-id pattern for all domain entities; provides EF Core parameterless constructor pattern

nodes.label: Asignatura (Academic Subject)
nodes.rationale: Session duration (HorasPorSesion) is immutable after creation — hard constraint per CLAUDE.md rule 6. TipoA alternancia is determined by matching the course name 'quimica general'.

nodes.label: BloqueTiempo (Time Block)
nodes.rationale: Discrete schedulable time slot; Saturday has earlier cutoff (14:00) vs weekdays (22:00); duration is a calculated property

nodes.label: Docente (Teacher)
nodes.rationale: Holds both abstract FranjaHoraria availability and concrete BloqueTiempo slots from existing schedules; apellido/correo optional for pilot

nodes.label: Espacio (Physical Space)
nodes.rationale: Virtual sessions have EspacioId=null; capacity validation is a domain invariant required for scheduling fit checks

nodes.label: Grupo (Student Group)
nodes.rationale: Semestre validated to [1,10]; carries TipoAlternancia so group-level alternancia can override or complement asignatura-level

nodes.label: Horario (Schedule)
nodes.rationale: Publishing is blocked when ViolacionesRestriccionesDuras > 0, enforcing CLAUDE.md rule about not publishing a schedule with hard constraint violations

nodes.label: Sesion (Academic Session)
nodes.rationale: Central scheduling unit linking Asignatura+Docente+BloqueTiempo+Espacio+Grupo; EspacioId nullable for virtual; mutually exclusive EsBloque/EstaDividida flags; duration validated [0,8]
